case_title: SALVADOR TORRES LOPEZ VS. ESSENCIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, SALVADOR TORRES AS TO DEFENDANT ESSENCIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, SALVADOR TORRES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESSENCIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,203.66 PRINCIPAL, $67.75 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,496.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
